questions.question: What are three key considerations when choosing between immediate system disconnection and gradual containment?
expectedPoints: Potential for evidence loss vs. continued damage
Type and scope of the incident

questions.question: Describe the process of implementing containment actions while preserving forensic evidence for investigation.
expectedPoints: Prioritize collection of volatile data (RAM, processes, network connections)
Use forensic tools to create images without altering evidence
Document all actions taken with timestamps and methodology
Maintain chain of custody for all collected evidence
Balance containment urgency with evidence preservation needs
